attackMechanism:
Add a shared 3-phase attack clock entirely inside trollAI (client-cosmetic; onHit/damagePlayer still fires once per swing, only at the strike sub-frame instead of immediately, so co-op damage timing is logically unchanged). dx/dz/d and dt/t are already in scope at trollAI line 2739, so the helpers can use them directly.

PREREQ HELPERS (do FIRST — they do not exist; only clamp@183 and lerp@184 exist): add near line 184 — const remap=(u,a,b)=>clamp((u-a)/(b-a),0,1); const easeInOut=u=>u<.5?2*u*u:1-Math.pow(-2*u+2,2)/2; const easeOutCubic=u=>1-Math.pow(1-u,3); const easeOutBack=u=>{const c=1.70158;return 1+(c+1)*Math.pow(u-1,3)+c*Math.pow(u-1,2);}; Without these the entire attack spec is uncompilable.

STATE FIELDS in makeMonster m={...} (line 2016, beside atkCd:0.6): m.atkPhase=0, m.atkT=0, m.atkDur=0, m.atkHit=false, m.lungeBase=null, m.atkKind=null.

HELPERS just above meleeAttack (line 2756): startAtk(dur,kind){ if(m.atkPhase>0) return false; m.atkPhase=0.0001; m.atkT=0; m.atkDur=dur; m.atkHit=false; m.atkKind=kind; m.lungeBase={x:p.x,z:p.z}; return true; } ; lunge(amt){ if(!m.lungeBase) return; p.x=m.lungeBase.x+(dx/d)*amt; p.z=m.lungeBase.z+(dz/d)*amt; } (rewrites p from lungeBase each frame so it never compounds) ; endAtk(){ m.atkPhase=0; m.atkKind=null; if(m.lungeBase){ p.x=m.lungeBase.x; p.z=m.lungeBase.z; m.lungeBase=null; } torso.rotation.x=0; torso.rotation.z=0; head.rotation.x=0; g.scale.set(m.scale,m.scale,m.scale); } (safety-net settle for joints walk does not own).

REPLACE meleeAttack(onHit) at line 2756 with meleeAttack(kind,dur,onHit): if m.atkPhase<=0 it decrements m.atkCd and, while m.atkCd>0, holds a relaxed guard (lerp arms.L/R.rotation.x toward 0.5 at 0.15) and returns; once ready it calls startAtk. While running it advances m.atkT+=dt, u=min(1,atkT/dur), m.atkPhase=u, calls ATK[kind](m,u,dx,dz,d,lunge) (writes ABSOLUTE pose for joints it owns), and at u>=ATK_HITFRAC[kind] fires the vertical-range-gated onHit ONCE (preserve the existing player.pos.y-1.7 < p.y+1.9*m.scale gate; on whiff set m.atkCd=0.4 and abort the swing via lunge(0)+endAtk-style cleanup). endAtk() at u>=1. ATK is a per-kind lookup of pose fns split via remap(u,a,b) into windup/strike/recovery; ATK_HITFRAC[kind] is the strike-connect u.

WALK COMPOSITION: each melee case calls walkAnim() ONLY in its d>range branch; in the attack branch meleeAttack returns early while atkPhase>0 so walkAnim never fights the swing. Joints an attack does not own keep their last walk value (harmless, small) and walk reclaims them next idle frame.

RANGED TYPES (shaman line 2782-2784, spitter line 2805-2806) are NOT atkPhase-driven: they already own their joints during their existing m.casting/T.castWind / m.beaming / m.rangedTimer windows. Just enrich those poses in-place — no clock, no new state.

orderedSteps.change: Add remap, easeInOut, easeOutCubic, easeOutBack. The attack spec references all four but only clamp/lerp exist — without these nothing in the attack pass compiles. Verify: console has no ReferenceError on first troll attack.

orderedSteps.area: Shared material value-contrast pass (lines 255,262 + verify elementSkin emInt)
orderedSteps.change: Color-agnostic identity prep so per-type SILHOUETTE reads under any random tint. bellyMat 0x9ec089 -> bone-cream ~0xd9d2bc (light anchor: throat/inner-ear/belly rims). mossMat 0x3c5a3e: lower roughness 1 -> ~0.92 (faceted highlight step) — keep it the dark anchor. tuskMat 0xeee2cf stays. VERIFY all non-wisp element presets keep emInt <= ~0.3 (high emissive flattens flat-shaded shadow and erases the form under tint). Verify: a fire-tinted and an ice-tinted grunt are still distinguishable from a scout by shape alone.

orderedSteps.area: embellishTroll SPLIT into light shared pass (lines 1547-1573)
orderedSteps.change: This is the biggest source of silhouette homogenization and must precede per-type hero work. (a) MOVE the bone HORNS (1563-1564) and tall back-CREST (1566-1567) OUT of the shared pass entirely — each build() now owns its crown. (b) DELETE the chest RUNA sprite (1572) for all non-shaman/non-wisp types (additive 0x36c5ff reads as VFX noise and muddies tint). (c) Pull the 5 moss/lichen clumps (1569) off the silhouette edge: clamp x to +/-0.34, push z to -0.30..-0.46. (d) Drop glow mushrooms from 2-3 to exactly 1 small back spore (sc 0.55, opacity 0.5). (e) Keep the 3 warts (1570). Net ~16 -> ~9 meshes, no two types share a crown. Verify: grunt/scout/brute/spitter/shaman/shard no longer carry the generic horns+crest.

orderedSteps.area: DEATH SAFETY in killMonster (right after line 2384: m.alive=false; m.dying=0.001;)
orderedSteps.change: Insert BEFORE any per-type attack code can ever run again (m.dying>0 makes update take the death branch and skip trollAI). Add: if(m.lungeBase){ m.g.position.x=m.lungeBase.x; m.g.position.z=m.lungeBase.z; m.lungeBase=null; } m.atkPhase=0; m.atkKind=null; m.atkHit=false; m.torso.rotation.set(0,0,0); m.head.rotation.x=0; — restores a mid-lunge position and clears a mid-swing pose so the deathStyle switch (owns arms/legs/head/g.scale/g.position/g.rotation, never torso) starts clean. Do this once now so every attack added later is death-safe by construction. Verify: kill a troll mid-swing — no frozen half-lunge or drift into the topple.

orderedSteps.area: Attack clock scaffold in trollAI (helpers above line 2756 + REPLACE meleeAttack + add ATK/ATK_HITFRAC tables)
orderedSteps.change: Add startAtk/lunge/endAtk and the per-kind meleeAttack(kind,dur,onHit) described in attackMechanism, plus empty ATK{} / ATK_HITFRAC{} tables to be filled per type. Also harden the two early-returns: the rooted/frozenSolid block (line 2745) and any coopIsRemote return must also set m.atkPhase=0 and call lunge-restore, so a paralyzed or remote troll can't freeze in a half-lunge. Verify: a rooted troll mid-swing snaps to guard, no positional drift; remote co-op trolls only walk.

VISUAL: postureLean 0.05->0.12, shoulderW 1.0->1.12, torsoW 1.0->1.05, neckLen 0->-0.03. Club head burl Dodeca(0.20)->(0.24)+jitter(0.05,0.05); club.rotation.x -0.35->-0.20 (head clears outline). ADD 1 pale bellyMat throat wedge on m.head (Sphere(0.22,9,6) at 0,-0.14,0.22, scale 1.3,0.5,0.9). Keep crown moss + 3 warts. ATTACK: kind 'gruntSmash', dur 1.05, HITFRAC 0.55. Owns arms.L, arms.R, torso, head, g.scale.y, lunge. windup u0-0.40 easeInOut: arms.R.x 0.5->-1.4 (club rears overhead, club is fist-parented so it carries), arms.R.z 0->-0.25, arms.L.x 0.5->-0.5, torso.x 0->-0.30, head.x 0->-0.20, g.scale.y *lerp(1,0.97), lunge -0.15. strike u0.40-0.62 easeOutBack: arms.R.x -1.4->1.85 (overshoot), arms.R.z ->0, arms.L.x ->0.9, torso.x ->0.45, head.x ->0.35, g.scale.y ->1.0, lunge ->0.30 (onHit at 0.55). recovery u0.62-1 easeOutCubic: all ->walk baseline (arms 0.5, torso/head 0), lunge held then 0 at endAtk. Verify: club visibly arcs overhead and chops; damage fires once at impact.

VISUAL: postureLean 0.32->0.40, torsoW 0.72->0.66, neckLen 0->0.06, earLen 0.85->0.95 (keep pale bellyMat inner-ear membrane = the rim-plane other types copy). ADD 1 skinDark Cone(0.03,0.08,4) notch in one ear tip (torn-ear). Confirm forearm bone daggers ride the arm Groups so the twin-swipe swings them. Keep 1 ear-moss tuft, snaggle fangs. ATTACK: kind 'scoutClaw', dur 0.42, HITFRAC 0.30. Owns arms.L, arms.R, torso(z only), legs(hop via scale), g.scale, lunge. windup u0-0.08: arms.R.x 0.5->-0.5, arms.L.x 0.5->0.2 (snap-load, no lean/backstep). strike: Swipe A s1=easeOutBack(remap(u,0.08,0.34)): arms.R.x -0.5->1.4, arms.R.z 0->0.5, arms.L.x 0.2->-0.6, torso.z 0->0.2; Swipe B s2=easeOutBack(remap(u,0.34,0.65)): arms.L.x -0.6->1.4, arms.L.z 0->-0.5, arms.R.x 1.4->0.3, torso.z 0.2->-0.2; hop g.scale.y=m.scale*(1+0.05*sin(u*PI)), lunge 0.18*sin(u*PI). onHit ONCE at 0.30. recovery u0.65-1 easeOutCubic: arms->0.5, z->0, torso.z->0, lunge 0. Verify: two visible alternating slashes, one damage event, quick re-engage.

VISUAL: neckLen -0.10->-0.14, head.scale 0.82->0.78, shoulderW 1.5->1.6, torsoW 1.35->1.42, postureLean 0.18->0.22. ADD 2 bellyMat LIT TOP-PLANE caps (one per pauldron, Dodeca(0.30,0) jittered at p[0],p[1]+0.16,p[2], scale 1.0,0.35,1.0). jitter the maul head (1694) if not already; widen tusk splay rotation.z s*0.28->s*0.40. ATTACK: kind 'bruteSlam', dur 1.5 (longest), HITFRAC 0.50. Owns arms.L, arms.R, torso, head, legs, g.scale, lunge. windup u0-0.45 easeInOut: arms.L/R.x 0.5->-1.6, arms.L.z 0->0.2, arms.R.z 0->-0.2, torso.x 0->-0.25, head.x 0->0.30 (down at ground), legs.L/R.x 0->0.35 (crouch), SQUASH g.scale.set(m.scale*(1+0.06w),m.scale*(1-0.12w),m.scale*(1+0.06w)), lunge -0.10. strike u0.45-0.60 easeOutBack: arms.L/R.x ->1.95, arms.z->0, torso.x ->0.40, head.x ~0.35, legs.x ->0, STRETCH g.scale (1-0.04s,1+0.04s,1-0.04s), lunge ->0.28. onHit at 0.50 fires the EXISTING brute block UNCHANGED (damage + kb 3.2 + clampToBoundary + shake 0.5 + m.rooted 0.5 + gore.burst) — that IS the impact emphasis. recovery u0.60-1 easeOutCubic (slowest): all ->baseline, g.scale uniform, lunge 0. Verify: both fists slam, screen shake + knockback still land exactly once.

VISUAL: jitter() the 3 Tetrahedron rubble bits (1706) and the back/shoulder plates. ADD 1-2 angular woodMat Icosa(0.22,0) shard-plates jittered on back/shoulder (e.g. 0.18,1.3,-0.25) so the cutout reads 'broken stone'. ADD 1 pale bellyMat chip on one plate (rim plane). Keep _crackMat orange seams as the only glow. ATTACK: kind 'shardJab', dur 0.30 (fastest), HITFRAC 0.45. Owns arms.R, torso(z slight), lunge ONLY. windup u0-0.15 (linear ok): arms.R.x 0.5->0.0 (chamber to chest, NOT overhead), torso.z 0->0.12. strike u0.15-0.45 easeOutBack: arms.R.x 0.0->1.5, torso.z 0.12->-0.08, lunge ->0.20. onHit at 0.45. recovery u0.45-1 easeOutCubic: arms.R.x ->0.5, torso.z ->0, lunge 0. No g.scale change. This REPLACES the generic default-case path for shard (give shard its own case before default). Verify: short straight jab, no overhead wind-up.

orderedSteps.area: SHAMAN visual (build lines 1719-1747) then pose-enrich the EXISTING cast (trollAI 2782-2790) — NOT atkPhase
orderedSteps.change: VISUAL: neckLen 0.15->0.20, torsoW 0.85->0.80 (narrow spire). horn.rotation.z s*0.62->s*0.72; ADD 1 rear tine per side (2 meshes). ADD pale bellyMat inner facet per main horn (rim plane). Keep crystal staff (stays on g, does NOT swing) + bone-bead necklace + shoulder moss-mantle. ATTACK (reuse m.casting/T.castWind + m.beaming): BOLT windup while m.casting>0, cc=1-max(0,m.casting)/T.castWind: arms.R.x lerp(0.5,-1.1,easeInOut(cc)) (deeper than current -0.9), arms.L.x lerp(0.5,-0.7,easeInOut(cc)) (two-handed), torso.x ->-0.20, head.x ->-0.15; keep crystal emissive ramp 1.4..3.6 as charge meter. BOLT release (m.casting<=0 frame, shamanCast fires unchanged): lerp arms.R.x toward 1.0 at 0.4 for ~3 frames (downward staff-point), torso.x ->0.15. RECOVERY: in the idle positioning branch (2780) add torso.x=lerp(...,0,0.1), head.x=lerp(...,0,0.1) so the lean settles. BEAM (while m.beaming): hold HUNCHED pose — torso.x lerp(...,0.30,0.15), head.x lerp(...,0.25,0.15), arms.L/R.x lerp(...,0.9,0.15), optional lunge(0.12). No new damage timing. Verify: upright two-handed staff-raise telegraphs the bolt; close-range beam is a distinct sustained hunch.

orderedSteps.area: SPITTER visual (build lines 1764-1786, CACHE m.bellySac) then pose-enrich EXISTING m.rangedTimer fire (trollAI 2805-2806)
orderedSteps.change: CROSS-DEPENDENCY: the attack tell inflates the belly, so build() MUST cache the main bile-sac mesh as m.bellySac (line 1767) — do this in the visual step or the attack inflate is a no-op. VISUAL: torsoW 1.25->1.32, postureLean 0.10->0.16; lower main sac y0.86->0.80, push z0.30->0.36 (overhangs legs); keep pale bellyMat ridge (rim plane) + pustule cluster (back signature). ATTACK (wrap existing rangedTimer): CHARGE when m.rangedTimer in (0,0.5], cw=easeInOut(1-rangedTimer/0.5): torso.x 0->-0.40 (lurch back), head.x 0->-0.25, arms.L/R.x 0.3->-0.5 (rear back to cradle), m.bellySac.scale.setScalar(1+0.10*cw) (the tell), lunge -0.20. HEAVE (m.rangedTimer<=0, spitterFire fires unchanged): torso.x lerp(...,0.50,0.5) ~3-4 frames, head.x ->0.30, arms.L/R.x lerp(...,1.2,0.5), m.bellySac.scale ->1.0, lunge ->0.18. RECOVERY (bandMin/bandMax idle branch where arms are set to 0.3): torso.x lerp(...,0,0.12), head.x lerp(...,0,0.12), m.bellySac.scale->1.0. Verify: belly visibly swells + toad rocks back before the lob, deflates on throw; projectile timing unchanged.

orderedSteps.area: WISP visual rework + dedicated attack case (build lines 1592-1599, embellishTroll 1548, new trollAI case before default) — see wispFix for the parallel gameplay fixes
orderedSteps.change: VISUAL (creature-not-particle): m.bodySkin.opacity 0.6->0.92 (still transparent for a faint edge; bodySkin is a per-monster clone so safe). ADD opaque non-additive cloth=std({color:0x0e2c38,emissive:0x1b6f8c,emissiveIntensity:0.5,flatShading:true}); a hooded mantle Cone(0.55,1.6,7) ~y1.3 over torso+head + 2 jagged hem Cones(0.22,0.7,6); a bone face-plate (flattened bellyMat Sphere(0.16,8,6)) carrying the 2 emissive eye spheres; 2 curved wraith horns (reuse horn code with cloth). Cut additive dominance: core sprite opacity 0.85->0.45 + scale 1.2->0.8; sparks 5->2 + opacity 0.5->0.3. In embellishTroll, replace the blanket early-return (line 1548) with a wisp-specific opaque accent pass (no moss; the silhouette features above) so it has a distinct cutout under any tint. ~5 added meshes. ATTACK: kind 'wispBite', dur 0.45, HITFRAC 0.45. Owns torso, head, arms(swept), g.scale, lunge. windup u0-0.20 easeInOut: torso.x 0->-0.35, head.x 0->-0.25, arms.L/R.x 0.5->-0.2 (trailing flame), g.scale (1-0.06w,1+0.10w,1-0.06w) (stretch tall), lunge -0.20. strike u0.20-0.50 easeOutBack: torso.x ->0.55, head.x ->0.45 (bite), arms.x ->1.2, g.scale (1+0.08s,1-0.06s,1+0.08s), lunge ->0.45 (biggest of all). onHit at 0.45. recovery u0.50-1 easeOutCubic: torso/head ->0, arms ->0.5, g.scale uniform, lunge 0 (restores its hover anchor so bob/weave resumes — for wisp set lungeBase to its current hover position on endAtk). Add this as an explicit 'wisp' case before default. Verify: opaque hooded wraith with a visible face; a readable rear-back-then-dart bite, not a streak.

wispFix: ROOT CAUSE 1 — fragility/one-shot is the #1 reason it's never seen. In TROLL_TYPES.wisp (line 1590): hpMul 0.6 -> 1.0 (wave5 ~38 -> ~64 HP, survives one ~48 charged arrow) AND resist.fire 1.5 -> 1.0 (it currently takes +50%, so a fire arrow up to ~72 dmg instantly deletes it before it's perceived). Keep ice 0.35 for theme. This is the single highest-impact gameplay fix.
ROOT CAUSE 2 — too fast / on screen <1s. speedMul 1.55 -> 1.2, speedCap 6.0 -> 4.5 (wave5 ~3.1 -> ~2.4), scaleMul 0.7 -> 0.95 (person-sized, lingers in view).

ROOT CAUSE 3 — reads as an FX particle. Covered by step 12 visual rework: opacity 0.6->0.92, opaque dark-teal hooded mantle + bone face-plate + 2 bright eyes + 2 wraith horns; cut the additive core (0.85->0.45, scale 1.2->0.8) and sparks (5->2, opacity 0.5->0.3) so the glow is a HALO around a solid body, not the body.

ROOT CAUSE 4 — embellishTroll early-returns for wisp (line 1548) so it gets ZERO silhouette enrichment. Replace the early-return with the wisp-specific opaque accent pass (step 12); do NOT add moss (it's a spirit).

ROOT CAUSE 5 — no telegraph. Add the dedicated 'wisp' case before default in trollAI (step 12, kind 'wispBite'): a readable rear-back-then-dart-bite via the new attack clock (head dip, eyes flash via m.eyeMat.emissiveIntensity, torso lunge) instead of falling through to the generic single-arm meleeAttack. Hover/slow when far so it dwells.

ROOT CAUSE 6 (secondary) — appears too late. Spawn weight (line 2289): change ['wisp', w>=2 ? clamp((w-1)*0.50,0,5):0] to ['wisp', w>=2 ? clamp(1.0+(w-1)*0.55,0,5):0] so wave2 share rises ~5.5% -> ~14%. Lowest priority — visibility fixes above matter far more than count.

NOTE on tinting: wisp innate el stays 'ice' (rollMonsterEl line 2298 forces it), and elementSkin skips its bodySkin recolor (line 1578); identity must come from the opaque SHAPE (hood/face/horns), not color — which is exactly why the silhouette rework is the load-bearing fix.
deferred: CONFLICT (resolved, do not implement as written): the brute attack spec says 'both arms drive the maul'. In code the brute maul is parented to g (line 1696), NOT to an arm, so it will NOT swing with arms.L/R. Resolve by treating bruteSlam as a pure two-fist body-slam pose (arms + torso + g.scale squash/stretch + screen shake sell the weight); do NOT try to animate the maul. Re-parenting the maul to an arm is DEFERRED (high regression risk on walk/death/co-op transforms for little gain — the slam reads fine without it).

CONFLICT (resolved): grunt club is parented to the RIGHT FIST (line 1623) so the overhead arms.R swing carries it correctly — no change needed; just confirm the enlarged 0.24 burl + rotation.x -0.20 still clears the body at the top of the windup (-1.4) without clipping the head. Quick visual check only.

DEFER the spitter belly-inflate IF caching m.bellySac proves fiddly: the back-lurch torso/head/arms tell already telegraphs the lob; the 10% belly swell is a nice-to-have. Ship the pose first, add m.bellySac.scale only if cheap.

DEFER any new geometry beyond the per-type addedMeshCounts in the visual design (grunt+1, scout+1, brute+2, shaman+2, spitter+0, wisp+~5, shard+2). With up to ~14 trolls + brute splits, net mesh delta is roughly flat (shared pass drops ~16->9). Do NOT add extra accents on top — budget is the constraint.

DEFER shaman/spitter being routed through the atkPhase clock — they already own their joints during their existing timer windows; folding them into the clock is needless risk. Enrich poses in-place only.

VERIFY-ONLY (not a change): confirm no element preset's emInt exceeds ~0.3 for non-wisp types (elementSkin line 1578) before shipping the value-contrast pass; if one does, clamp it, otherwise tinted trolls glow as featureless blobs and defeat the silhouette work.
